title: 毎日王冠の後に・運命、彼方に集いて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan feels the full force of the power
coursing through Oguri Cap and the other racers.
She promises Oguri Cap that, no matter what,
they will race again at the autumn Tenno Sho,
and she will claim victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As this happens, Inari One reveals that the
Eternal Top Three will all be present at the next
autumn Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan is elated to learn that she'll get to
meet the Eternal Top Three on the turf. The
autumn Tenno Sho—history's turning point—is
fast approaching.
